channel.title: NPR Programs: Morning Edition
channel.description: Morning Edition takes listeners around the country and the world with multi-faceted stories and commentaries every weekday. Hosts Steve Inskeep, Leila Fadel, Michel Martin and A Martínez bring you the latest breaking news and features to prepare you for the day.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Trump heads to China amid ongoing war with Iran
item.description: President Trump's trip to China is going forward despite the war with Iran casting a shadow over the state visit.
item.content:encoded: President Trump's trip to China is going forward despite the war with Iran casting a shadow over the state visit.
item.dc:creator: Tamara Keith

item.title: Rep. Ro Khanna, D-Calif., on Trump's visit to China
item.description: NPR's A Martínez asks Rep. Ro Khanna, ranking member of the House Select Committee on Strategic Competition between the U.S. and China, about President Trump's talks with his Chinese counterpart.
item.content:encoded: NPR's A Martínez asks Rep. Ro Khanna, ranking member of the House Select Committee on Strategic Competition between the U.S. and China, about President Trump's talks with his Chinese counterpart.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: 'Marty, Life Is Short' reveals the losses endured by comedy legend Martin Short
item.description: After a long career in comedy, Martin Short shares his story of "love, loss and survival" in a new Netflix documentary, Marty, Life Is Short.
item.content:encoded:
After a long career in comedy, Martin Short shares his story of "love, loss and survival" in a new Netflix documentary, Marty, Life Is Short.

(Image credit: Netflix © 2026)
item.dc:creator: Phil Harrell

item.title: Marketers say NAD+ pills and infusions can boost longevity. What's the evidence?
item.description: Wellness and longevity influencers are pushing a compound called NAD+. There's scientific interest in its potential, but researchers say the marketing claims have gotten ahead of the science.
item.content:encoded: Wellness and longevity influencers are pushing a compound called NAD+. There's scientific interest in its potential, but researchers say the marketing claims have gotten ahead of the science.
item.dc:creator: Will Stone

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Trump says Iran's response to the U.S. ceasefire proposal is "totally unacceptable," Trump heads to China amid Iran war, Congress returns after week-long break.
item.content:encoded: Trump says Iran's response to the U.S. ceasefire proposal is "totally unacceptable," Trump heads to China amid Iran war, Congress returns after week-long break.
item.dc:creator: Michel Martin

item.title: AI on the agenda as Trump heads to China
item.description: Artificial intelligence on the agenda for President Trump's upcoming meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping.
item.content:encoded: Artificial intelligence on the agenda for President Trump's upcoming meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping.
item.dc:creator: Deepa Shivaram

item.title: Some researchers say restored federal funding is too little, too late
item.description: The Trump administration restored some of the billions of dollars previously frozen or withheld from research institutions and agencies. Some researchers say it's too late to save their work.
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration restored some of the billions of dollars previously frozen or withheld from research institutions and agencies. Some researchers say it's too late to save their work.
item.dc:creator: Katia Riddle

item.title: Earth, Wind & Fire's founder wrote orchestral music. It hadn't been heard until now
item.description: An orchestra performs the world premiere of a piece by the late Earth, Wind & Fire founder Maurice White, 23 years after he composed it.
item.content:encoded: An orchestra performs the world premiere of a piece by the late Earth, Wind & Fire founder Maurice White, 23 years after he composed it.
item.dc:creator: Hosts

item.title: Trump calls Iran's latest response to U.S. ceasefire proposal 'totally unacceptable'
item.description: Iran says it will not give in to Trump's demands as Trump calls Iran's response "totally unacceptable."
item.content:encoded: Iran says it will not give in to Trump's demands as Trump calls Iran's response "totally unacceptable."
item.dc:creator: Michel Martin

item.title: Retired general on what comes next as Iran responds to U.S. proposal to end war
item.description: As Iran delivers a new response to a U.S. truce proposal and President Trump prepares to visit China, NPR's A Martinez asks retired Gen. Joseph Votel about the implications for war in the Middle East.
item.content:encoded: As Iran delivers a new response to a U.S. truce proposal and President Trump prepares to visit China, NPR's A Martinez asks retired Gen. Joseph Votel about the implications for war in the Middle East.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez
